creator: flo@smeets.im
text:
asterisk 1.8.x is the new LTS release, Max Kohn suggested to put 1.8 into net/asterisk therefore the following repo copies are required

net/asterisk -> net/asterisk14
net/asterisk-addons -> net/asterisk14-addons
net/asterisk16 -> net/asterisk

After that Max will commit my patches to connect asterisk14 and the addons to
the build. Fix conflicts of all asterisk ports, update net/asterisk to 1.8.0,
remove net/asterisk-addons, and of course add an UPDATING entry.
